summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ School Management System - Iteration 66. All 4 priority features tested and working: 1) Time slots display correctly on Schedule page, 2) Subjects CRUD (Add/Edit/Delete) working, 3) Constraints CRUD (Add/Edit/Delete/Toggle) working, 4) Active Role Context APIs working.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - test data prefixed with TEST_ and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 priority features fully tested and working. Subjects CRUD at /api/school/subjects, Constraints CRUD at /api/school/constraints, Active Role Context at /api/auth/active-role and /api/auth/set-active-role. Schedule page shows time slots correctly with breaks and prayer periods.

time_slots_display.evidence: Schedule page at /school/schedule shows 7 periods + break + prayer with correct times (07:00-13:15)

subjects_crud_add.evidence: POST /api/school/subjects creates new subject, returns id and success message

subjects_crud_edit.evidence: PUT /api/school/subjects/{id} updates subject name, weekly_periods, category

subjects_ui_add_button.evidence: Settings page المواد tab shows 'إضافة مادة' button that opens dialog with form fields

constraints_crud_add.evidence: POST /api/school/constraints creates new constraint with priority and type

constraints_crud_edit.evidence: PUT /api/school/constraints/{id} updates constraint name, priority, is_active

constraints_toggle_active.evidence: PUT /api/school/constraints/{id} with is_active toggles constraint status

constraints_ui_add_button.evidence: Settings page القيود tab shows 'إضافة قيد' button that opens dialog

constraints_ui_toggle_buttons.evidence: Each constraint has مفعّل/معطّل toggle button for activation

active_role_get.evidence: GET /api/auth/active-role returns user_identity_id, role_id, role_name, school_id

active_role_set.evidence: POST /api/auth/set-active-role sets active role context and returns updated context

frontend_tests.settings_subjects_tab: PASSED - Shows 12 subjects with Add button and dialog
frontend_tests.settings_constraints_tab: PASSED - Shows 4 constraints with Add button, toggle buttons, and dialog
frontend_tests.schedule_page_time_slots: PASSED - Shows 7 periods + break + prayer with correct times
frontend_tests.schedule_page_days: PASSED - Shows 5 working days (الأحد to الخميس)
